title: Data review
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dpv7q","text":"This protocols aims to details the steps necessary to review new data points for the \"Database Justice League\" project.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"6plb3","text":"Before starting this protocol, you need to have recieved the list of articles you will be working on. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8the0","text":"Contact the professor if you haven't received the dataset.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Once you have received the link to download your dataset, download the csv file locally. Make sure to save it on your computer in a convenient folder! The goal of this review process is to Ensure a quality control for the dataset collected by peers Discuss and document potential choices that have to be taken during the collection process

First, access the article describing the dataset Remember that you can use the column "DOI" to find the article online. In order to access the paper search in you web browser : https://doi.org/ + DOI number

First, look at the name collected for the database and the one in the paper. Do you see any potential mistakes? Keep in mind the following: Does the database has two names or one? Was this reported correctly in the dataset to review? Is the paper about a new database or an update? Was this reported correctly in the dataset to review? If any disrepency or conflict is detected, add a note in the Note_review2021 column of the spread sheet. Do not modify the original data collected direclty.

Next we want to assess if the URLand the accessibility reported for the database is exact. Look at the URL collected, is it matching the one visible in the article? If any disrepency or conflict is detected, add a note in the Note_review2021 column of the spread sheet. Do not modify the original data collected direclty.

Finally, we want to check the availability of the database. Follow the link and assess if the ressource is available or not. Does it match what was reported in the data collected? Once again, if any disrepency or conflict is detected, add a note in the Note_review2021 column of the spread sheet. Do not modify the original data collected direclty.
Great job! You collected all the data we needed to complete the DB Justice League! Upload the table on Github and notify us of the upload! Thank you for your great contribution!
creator: Alise J Ponsero
